head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland, Auckland, Coromandel and Waikato
Generally fine, with isolated showers about Northland clearing early morning. Showers developing south of the Bay of Islands this evening, some heavy about Great Barrier Island and Coromandel.
Bay of Plenty, Waitomo and the central high country
Fine, with early frosts, and a possible shower this afternoon or evening.
Taranaki to Kapiti
Partly cloudy with isolated showers, clearing this evening.
Gisborne to Wairarapa and Wellington, also the Kaikoura Coast
Showers, some maybe heavy with hail early morning, clearing from Wellington and the Kaikoura Coast this afternoon and easing elsewhere.
Remainder of Marlborough, and Canterbury
Isolated showers clearing this morning, and becoming fine.
Nelson, Buller to Fiordland, also Otago and Southland
Fine with early frosts, and the odd shower about the south coast.
Chatham Islands
Cloudy periods and the odd shower.
Friday

North Island: Partly cloudy, with isolated showers in the east, but rain possible for Northland.
South Island: Mainly fine, but a few showers for Fiordland and Southland.
Saturday

North Island: Fine, apart from isolated showers in the north.
South Island: Showers about Fiordland and Southland, clearing. Fine elsewhere.
Sunday

North Island: Partly cloudy, with isolated showers in the west.
South Island: Rain in the south, with some heavy falls. Isolated showers in the north and east. Showers developing elsewhere.
Chatham Islands
Occasional showers. Southwesterlies, strengthening on Saturday.
Issued: 11:30pm Wednesday 22 Apr 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
